name: INTERLINK ELECTRONICS INC
summary: Interlink Electronics, Inc. is a global provider of advanced sensing technologies and printed electronics solutions enabling Human-Machine Interface (HMI) devices and IoT applications. Products include FSR force/touch sensors, piezoelectric sensors, membrane keypads, smart textile sensors, and electrochemical gas/environmental sensors. The company serves medical, industrial, automotive, consumer electronics, wearables, and environmental monitoring markets from facilities in California, Singapore, China, Scotland, and the UK.

products.name: FSR (Force-Sensing Resistor) Sensors
products.description: Printed force-sensing resistor sensors for HMI applications in gaming, smartphones, rugged notebooks, and automotive systems.

products.name: HMI Technology Platforms
products.description: Multi-modal sensing platforms integrating force, capacitive, resistive, and piezoelectric technologies for medical, industrial, and automotive markets.

products.name: Membrane Keypads and Printed Electronics
products.description: Customized membrane keypads, graphic overlays, printed electronic circuits, and industrial labeling solutions for industrial and defense applications.

products.name: Smart Textiles and Conductive Transfers
products.description: Sensors and electronics integrated into textiles for heated garments, PPE, medical wearables, and automotive textile sensing.

products.name: Piezoelectric Polymer Film Sensors
products.description: Ultra-thin electroactive polymer film sensors for vibration sensing, impact detection, flow detection, and vital sign monitoring.

products.name: Electrochemical Gas Sensors
products.description: Miniature, low-power electrochemical sensors detecting a wide range of gases for IoT, industrial safety, and environmental monitoring.

products.name: Eco Sensors Ozone Monitors
products.description: Complete ozone monitoring instruments for environmental and air quality applications.

products.name: Air Quality Modules
products.description: Smart city air quality monitoring modules for community health and environmental compliance.
